  1221â†’// printMultiSessionResumeCommands prints resume commands for restored sessions.
  1222â†’// Each session may have a different agent, so per-session agent resolution is used.
  1223â†’func printMultiSessionResumeCommands(sessions []strategy.RestoredSession) {
  1224â†’	if len(sessions) == 0 {
  1225â†’		return
  1226â†’	}
  1227â†’
  1228â†’	if len(sessions) > 1 {
  1229â†’		fmt.Printf("\nRestored %d sessions. Resume with:\n", len(sessions))
  1230â†’	}
  1231â†’
  1232â†’	for i, sess := range sessions {
  1233â†’		ag, err := strategy.ResolveAgentForRewind(sess.Agent)
  1234â†’		if err != nil {
  1235â†’			fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "  Warning: could not resolve agent %q for session %s, skipping\n", sess.Agent, sess.SessionID)
  1236â†’			continue
  1237â†’		}
  1238â†’
  1239â†’		cmd := ag.FormatResumeCommand(sess.SessionID)
  1240â†’
  1241â†’		if len(sessions) > 1 {
  1242â†’			// Add "(most recent)" label to the last session
  1243â†’			if i == len(sessions)-1 {
  1244â†’				if sess.Prompt != "" {
  1245â†’					fmt.Printf("  %s  # %s (most recent)\n", cmd, sess.Prompt)
  1246â†’				} else {
  1247â†’					fmt.Printf("  %s  # (most recent)\n", cmd)
  1248â†’				}
  1249â†’			} else {
  1250â†’				if sess.Prompt != "" {
  1251â†’					fmt.Printf("  %s  # %s\n", cmd, sess.Prompt)
  1252â†’				} else {
  1253â†’					fmt.Printf("  %s\n", cmd)
  1254â†’				}
  1255â†’			}
  1256â†’		} else {
  1257â†’			if sess.Prompt != "" {
  1258â†’				fmt.Printf("%s  # %s\n", cmd, sess.Prompt)
  1259â†’			} else {
  1260â†’				fmt.Printf("%s\n", cmd)
  1261â†’			}
  1262â†’		}
  1263â†’	}
  1264â†’}

    30â†’// listCheckpoints returns all checkpoints from the metadata branch.
    31â†’// Uses checkpoint.GitStore.ListCommitted() for reading from entire/checkpoints/v1.
    32â†’func (s *ManualCommitStrategy) listCheckpoints() ([]CheckpointInfo, error) {
    33â†’	store, err := s.getCheckpointStore()
    34â†’	if err != nil {
    35â†’		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to get checkpoint store: %w", err)
    36â†’	}
    37â†’
    38â†’	committed, err := store.ListCommitted(context.Background())
    39â†’	if err != nil {
    40â†’		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to list committed checkpoints: %w", err)
    41â†’	}
    42â†’
    43â†’	// Convert from checkpoint.CommittedInfo to strategy.CheckpointInfo
    44â†’	result := make([]CheckpointInfo, 0, len(committed))
    45â†’	for _, c := range committed {
    46â†’		result = append(result, CheckpointInfo{
    47â†’			CheckpointID:     c.CheckpointID,
    48â†’			SessionID:        c.SessionID,
    49â†’			CreatedAt:        c.CreatedAt,
    50â†’			CheckpointsCount: c.CheckpointsCount,
    51â†’			FilesTouched:     c.FilesTouched,
    52â†’			Agent:            c.Agent,
    53â†’			IsTask:           c.IsTask,
    54â†’			ToolUseID:        c.ToolUseID,
    55â†’			SessionCount:     c.SessionCount,
    56â†’			SessionIDs:       c.SessionIDs,
    57â†’		})
    58â†’	}
    59â†’
    60â†’	return result, nil
    61â†’}

   106â†’// CondenseSession condenses a session's shadow branch to permanent storage.
   107â†’// checkpointID is the 12-hex-char value from the Entire-Checkpoint trailer.
   108â†’// Metadata is stored at sharded path: <checkpoint_id[:2]>/<checkpoint_id[2:]>/
   109â†’// Uses checkpoint.GitStore.WriteCommitted for the git operations.
   110â†’//
   111â†’// For mid-session commits (no Stop/SaveChanges called yet), the shadow branch may not exist.
   112â†’// In this case, data is extracted from the live transcript instead.
   113â†’func (s *ManualCommitStrategy) CondenseSession(repo *git.Repository, checkpointID id.CheckpointID, state *SessionState, committedFiles map[string]struct{}) (*CondenseResult, error) {
   114â†’	// Get shadow branch (may not exist for mid-session commits)
   115â†’	shadowBranchName := getShadowBranchNameForCommit(state.BaseCommit, state.WorktreeID)
   116â†’	refName := plumbing.NewBranchReferenceName(shadowBranchName)
   117â†’	ref, err := repo.Reference(refName, true)
   118â†’	hasShadowBranch := err == nil
   119â†’
   120â†’	var sessionData *ExtractedSessionData
   121â†’	if hasShadowBranch {
   122â†’		// Extract session data from the shadow branch (with live transcript fallback).
   123â†’		// Use tracked files from session state instead of collecting all files from tree.
   124â†’		// Pass agent type to handle different transcript formats (JSONL for Claude, JSON for Gemini).
   125â†’		// Pass live transcript path so condensation reads the current file rather than a
   126â†’		// potentially stale shadow branch copy (SaveChanges may have been skipped if the
   127â†’		// last turn had no code changes).
   128â†’		// Pass CheckpointTranscriptStart for accurate token calculation (line offset for Claude, message index for Gemini).
   129â†’		sessionData, err = s.extractSessionData(repo, ref.Hash(), state.SessionID, state.FilesTouched, state.AgentType, state.TranscriptPath, state.CheckpointTranscriptStart)
   130â†’		if err != nil {
   131â†’			return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to extract session data: %w", err)
   132â†’		}
   133â†’	} else {
   134â†’		// No shadow branch: mid-session commit before Stop/SaveChanges.
   135â†’		// Extract data directly from live transcript.
   136â†’		if state.TranscriptPath == "" {
   137â†’			return nil, errors.New("shadow branch not found and no live transcript available")
   138â†’		}
   139â†’		sessionData, err = s.extractSessionDataFromLiveTranscript(state)
   140â†’		if err != nil {
   141â†’			return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to extract session data from live transcript: %w", err)
   142â†’		}
   143â†’	}
   144â†’
   145â†’	// For 1:1 checkpoint model: filter files_touched to only include files actually
   146â†’	// committed in this specific commit. This ensures each checkpoint represents
   147â†’	// exactly the files in that commit, not all files mentioned in the transcript.
   148â†’	if len(committedFiles) > 0 {
   149â†’		if len(sessionData.FilesTouched) > 0 {
   150â†’			// Filter to intersection of transcript-extracted files and committed files
   151â†’			filtered := make([]string, 0, len(sessionData.FilesTouched))
   152â†’			for _, f := range sessionData.FilesTouched {
   153â†’				if _, ok := committedFiles[f]; ok {
   154â†’					filtered = append(filtered, f)
   155â†’				}
   156â†’			}
   157â†’			sessionData.FilesTouched = filtered
   158â†’		}
   159â†’
   160â†’		// If extraction failed or returned empty, use committedFiles as fallback.
   161â†’		// This handles mid-session commits where transcript parsing may not find files
   162â†’		// but we know what was committed.
   163â†’		if len(sessionData.FilesTouched) == 0 {
   164â†’			sessionData.FilesTouched = make([]string, 0, len(committedFiles))
   165â†’			for f := range committedFiles {
   166â†’				sessionData.FilesTouched = append(sessionData.FilesTouched, f)
   167â†’			}
   168â†’		}
   169â†’	}
   170â†’
   171â†’	// Get checkpoint store
   172â†’	store, err := s.getCheckpointStore()
   173â†’	if err != nil {
   174â†’		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to get checkpoint store: %w", err)
   175â†’	}
   176â†’
   177â†’	// Get author info
   178â†’	authorName, authorEmail := GetGitAuthorFromRepo(repo)
   179â†’	// Attribution calculation requires shadow branch reference; skip if mid-session commit
   180â†’	var attribution *cpkg.InitialAttribution
   181â†’	if hasShadowBranch {
   182â†’		attribution = calculateSessionAttributions(repo, ref, sessionData, state)
   183â†’	}
   184â†’	// Get current branch name
   185â†’	branchName := GetCurrentBranchName(repo)
   186â†’
   187â†’	// Generate summary if enabled
   188â†’	var summary *cpkg.Summary
   189â†’	if settings.IsSummarizeEnabled() && len(sessionData.Transcript) > 0 {
   190â†’		logCtx := logging.WithComponent(context.Background(), "attribution")
   191â†’		summarizeCtx := logging.WithComponent(logCtx, "summarize")
   192â†’
   193â†’		// Scope transcript to this checkpoint's portion.
   194â†’		// For Claude Code (JSONL), CheckpointTranscriptStart is a line offset.
   195â†’		// For Gemini (JSON), CheckpointTranscriptStart is a message index.
   196â†’		var scopedTranscript []byte
   197â†’		if state.AgentType == agent.AgentTypeGemini {
   198â†’			scopedTranscript = geminicli.SliceFromMessage(sessionData.Transcript, state.CheckpointTranscriptStart)
   199â†’		} else {
   200â†’			scopedTranscript = transcript.SliceFromLine(sessionData.Transcript, state.CheckpointTranscriptStart)
   201â†’		}
   202â†’		if len(scopedTranscript) > 0 {
   203â†’			var err error
   204â†’			summary, err = summarize.GenerateFromTranscript(summarizeCtx, scopedTranscript, sessionData.FilesTouched, state.AgentType, nil)
   205â†’			if err != nil {
   206â†’				logging.Warn(summarizeCtx, "summary generation failed",
   207â†’					slog.String("session_id", state.SessionID),
   208â†’					slog.String("error", err.Error()))
   209â†’				// Continue without summary - non-blocking
   210â†’			} else {
   211â†’				logging.Info(summarizeCtx, "summary generated",
   212â†’					slog.String("session_id", state.SessionID))
   213â†’			}
   214â†’		}
   215â†’	}
   216â†’
   217â†’	// Write checkpoint metadata using the checkpoint store
   218â†’	if err := store.WriteCommitted(context.Background(), cpkg.WriteCommittedOptions{
   219â†’		CheckpointID:                checkpointID,
   220â†’		SessionID:                   state.SessionID,
   221â†’		Strategy:                    StrategyNameManualCommit,
   222â†’		Branch:                      branchName,
   223â†’		Transcript:                  sessionData.Transcript,
   224â†’		Prompts:                     sessionData.Prompts,
   225â†’		Context:                     sessionData.Context,
   226â†’		FilesTouched:                sessionData.FilesTouched,
   227â†’		CheckpointsCount:            state.StepCount,
   228â†’		EphemeralBranch:             shadowBranchName,
   229â†’		AuthorName:                  authorName,
   230â†’		AuthorEmail:                 authorEmail,
   231â†’		Agent:                       state.AgentType,
   232â†’		TurnID:                      state.TurnID,
   233â†’		TranscriptIdentifierAtStart: state.TranscriptIdentifierAtStart,
   234â†’		CheckpointTranscriptStart:   state.CheckpointTranscriptStart,
   235â†’		TokenUsage:                  sessionData.TokenUsage,
   236â†’		InitialAttribution:          attribution,
   237â†’		Summary:                     summary,
   238â†’		SessionTranscriptPath:       homeRelativePath(state.TranscriptPath),
   239â†’	}); err != nil {
   240â†’		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to write checkpoint metadata: %w", err)
   241â†’	}
   242â†’
   243â†’	return &CondenseResult{
   244â†’		CheckpointID:         checkpointID,
   245â†’		SessionID:            state.SessionID,
   246â†’		CheckpointsCount:     state.StepCount,
   247â†’		FilesTouched:         sessionData.FilesTouched,
   248â†’		TotalTranscriptLines: sessionData.FullTranscriptLines,
   249â†’	}, nil
   250â†’}

   252â†’func calculateSessionAttributions(repo *git.Repository, shadowRef *plumbing.Reference, sessionData *ExtractedSessionData, state *SessionState) *cpkg.InitialAttribution {
   253â†’	// Calculate initial attribution using accumulated prompt attribution data.
   254â†’	// This uses user edits captured at each prompt start (before agent works),
   255â†’	// plus any user edits after the final checkpoint (shadow â†’ head).
   256â†’	logCtx := logging.WithComponent(context.Background(), "attribution")
   257â†’	var attribution *cpkg.InitialAttribution
   258â†’	headRef, headErr := repo.Head()
   259â†’	if headErr != nil {
   260â†’		logging.Debug(logCtx, "attribution skipped: failed to get HEAD",
   261â†’			slog.String("error", headErr.Error()))
   262â†’	} else {
   263â†’		headCommit, commitErr := repo.CommitObject(headRef.Hash())
   264â†’		if commitErr != nil {
   265â†’			logging.Debug(logCtx, "attribution skipped: failed to get HEAD commit",
   266â†’				slog.String("error", commitErr.Error()))
   267â†’		} else {
   268â†’			headTree, treeErr := headCommit.Tree()
   269â†’			if treeErr != nil {
   270â†’				logging.Debug(logCtx, "attribution skipped: failed to get HEAD tree",
   271â†’					slog.String("error", treeErr.Error()))
   272â†’			} else {
   273â†’				// Get shadow branch tree (checkpoint tree - what the agent wrote)
   274â†’				shadowCommit, shadowErr := repo.CommitObject(shadowRef.Hash())
   275â†’				if shadowErr != nil {
   276â†’					logging.Debug(logCtx, "attribution skipped: failed to get shadow commit",
   277â†’						slog.String("error", shadowErr.Error()),
   278â†’						slog.String("shadow_ref", shadowRef.Hash().String()))
   279â†’				} else {
   280â†’					shadowTree, shadowTreeErr := shadowCommit.Tree()
   281â†’					if shadowTreeErr != nil {
   282â†’						logging.Debug(logCtx, "attribution skipped: failed to get shadow tree",
   283â†’							slog.String("error", shadowTreeErr.Error()))
   284â†’					} else {
   285â†’						// Get base tree (state before session started)
   286â†’						var baseTree *object.Tree
   287â†’						attrBase := state.AttributionBaseCommit
   288â†’						if attrBase == "" {
   289â†’							attrBase = state.BaseCommit // backward compat
   290â†’						}
   291â†’						if baseCommit, baseErr := repo.CommitObject(plumbing.NewHash(attrBase)); baseErr == nil {
   292â†’							if tree, baseTErr := baseCommit.Tree(); baseTErr == nil {
   293â†’								baseTree = tree
   294â†’							} else {
   295â†’								logging.Debug(logCtx, "attribution: base tree unavailable",
   296â†’									slog.String("error", baseTErr.Error()))
   297â†’							}
   298â†’						} else {
   299â†’							logging.Debug(logCtx, "attribution: base commit unavailable",
   300â†’								slog.String("error", baseErr.Error()),
   301â†’								slog.String("attribution_base", attrBase))
   302â†’						}
   303â†’
   304â†’						// Log accumulated prompt attributions for debugging
   305â†’						var totalUserAdded, totalUserRemoved int
   306â†’						for i, pa := range state.PromptAttributions {
   307â†’							totalUserAdded += pa.UserLinesAdded
   308â†’							totalUserRemoved += pa.UserLinesRemoved
   309â†’							logging.Debug(logCtx, "prompt attribution data",
   310â†’								slog.Int("checkpoint", pa.CheckpointNumber),
   311â†’								slog.Int("user_added", pa.UserLinesAdded),
   312â†’								slog.Int("user_removed", pa.UserLinesRemoved),
   313â†’								slog.Int("agent_added", pa.AgentLinesAdded),
   314â†’								slog.Int("agent_removed", pa.AgentLinesRemoved),
   315â†’								slog.Int("index", i))
   316â†’						}
   317â†’
   318â†’						attribution = CalculateAttributionWithAccumulated(
   319â†’							baseTree,
   320â†’							shadowTree,
   321â†’							headTree,
   322â†’							sessionData.FilesTouched,
   323â†’							state.PromptAttributions,
   324â†’						)
   325â†’
   326â†’						if attribution != nil {
   327â†’							logging.Info(logCtx, "attribution calculated",
   328â†’								slog.Int("agent_lines", attribution.AgentLines),
   329â†’								slog.Int("human_added", attribution.HumanAdded),
   330â†’								slog.Int("human_modified", attribution.HumanModified),
   331â†’								slog.Int("human_removed", attribution.HumanRemoved),
   332â†’								slog.Int("total_committed", attribution.TotalCommitted),
   333â†’								slog.Float64("agent_percentage", attribution.AgentPercentage),
   334â†’								slog.Int("accumulated_user_added", totalUserAdded),
   335â†’								slog.Int("accumulated_user_removed", totalUserRemoved),
   336â†’								slog.Int("files_touched", len(sessionData.FilesTouched)))
   337â†’						}
   338â†’					}
   339â†’				}
   340â†’			}
   341â†’		}
   342â†’	}
   343â†’	return attribution
   344â†’}
   345â†’
   346â†’// extractSessionData extracts session data from the shadow branch.
   347â†’// filesTouched is the list of files tracked during the session (from SessionState.FilesTouched).
   348â†’// agentType identifies the agent (e.g., "Gemini CLI", "Claude Code") to determine transcript format.
   349â†’// liveTranscriptPath, when non-empty and readable, is preferred over the shadow branch copy.
   350â†’// This handles the case where SaveChanges was skipped (no code changes) but the transcript
   351â†’// continued growing â€” the shadow branch copy would be stale.
   352â†’// checkpointTranscriptStart is the line offset (Claude) or message index (Gemini) where the current checkpoint began.
   353â†’func (s *ManualCommitStrategy) extractSessionData(repo *git.Repository, shadowRef plumbing.Hash, sessionID string, filesTouched []string, agentType agent.AgentType, liveTranscriptPath string, checkpointTranscriptStart int) (*ExtractedSessionData, error) {
   354â†’	commit, err := repo.CommitObject(shadowRef)
   355â†’	if err != nil {
   356â†’		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to get commit object: %w", err)
   357â†’	}
   358â†’
   359â†’	tree, err := commit.Tree()
   360â†’	if err != nil {
   361â†’		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to get commit tree: %w", err)
   362â†’	}
   363â†’
   364â†’	data := &ExtractedSessionData{}
   365â†’	// sessionID is already an "entire session ID" (with date prefix)
   366â†’	metadataDir := paths.SessionMetadataDirFromSessionID(sessionID)
   367â†’
   368â†’	// Extract transcript â€” prefer the live file when available, fall back to shadow branch.
   369â†’	// The shadow branch copy may be stale if the last turn ended without code changes
   370â†’	// (SaveChanges is only called when there are file modifications).
   371â†’	var fullTranscript string
   372â†’	if liveTranscriptPath != "" {
   373â†’		if liveData, readErr := os.ReadFile(liveTranscriptPath); readErr == nil && len(liveData) > 0 { //nolint:gosec // path from session state
   374â†’			fullTranscript = string(liveData)
   375â†’		}
   376â†’	}
   377â†’	if fullTranscript == "" {
   378â†’		// Fall back to shadow branch copy
   379â†’		if file, fileErr := tree.File(metadataDir + "/" + paths.TranscriptFileName); fileErr == nil {
   380â†’			if content, contentErr := file.Contents(); contentErr == nil {
   381â†’				fullTranscript = content
   382â†’			}
   383â†’		} else if file, fileErr := tree.File(metadataDir + "/" + paths.TranscriptFileNameLegacy); fileErr == nil {
   384â†’			if content, contentErr := file.Contents(); contentErr == nil {
   385â†’				fullTranscript = content
   386â†’			}
   387â†’		}
   388â†’	}
   389â†’
   390â†’	// Process transcript based on agent type
   391â†’	if fullTranscript != "" {
   392â†’		data.Transcript = []byte(fullTranscript)
   393â†’		data.FullTranscriptLines = countTranscriptItems(agentType, fullTranscript)
   394â†’		data.Prompts = extractUserPrompts(agentType, fullTranscript)
   395â†’		data.Context = generateContextFromPrompts(data.Prompts)
   396â†’	}
   397â†’
   398â†’	// Use tracked files from session state (not all files in tree)
   399â†’	data.FilesTouched = filesTouched
   400â†’
   401â†’	// Calculate token usage from the extracted transcript portion
   402â†’	if len(data.Transcript) > 0 {
   403â†’		data.TokenUsage = calculateTokenUsage(agentType, data.Transcript, checkpointTranscriptStart)
   404â†’	}
   405â†’
   406â†’	return data, nil
   407â†’}

   409â†’// extractSessionDataFromLiveTranscript extracts session data directly from the live transcript file.
   410â†’// This is used for mid-session commits where no shadow branch exists yet.
   411â†’func (s *ManualCommitStrategy) extractSessionDataFromLiveTranscript(state *SessionState) (*ExtractedSessionData, error) {
   412â†’	data := &ExtractedSessionData{}
   413â†’
   414â†’	// Read the live transcript
   415â†’	if state.TranscriptPath == "" {
   416â†’		return nil, errors.New("no transcript path in session state")
   417â†’	}
   418â†’
   419â†’	liveData, err := os.ReadFile(state.TranscriptPath)
   420â†’	if err != nil {
   421â†’		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to read live transcript: %w", err)
   422â†’	}
   423â†’
   424â†’	if len(liveData) == 0 {
   425â†’		return nil, errors.New("live transcript is empty")
   426â†’	}
   427â†’
   428â†’	fullTranscript := string(liveData)
   429â†’	data.Transcript = liveData
   430â†’	data.FullTranscriptLines = countTranscriptItems(state.AgentType, fullTranscript)
   431â†’	data.Prompts = extractUserPrompts(state.AgentType, fullTranscript)
   432â†’	data.Context = generateContextFromPrompts(data.Prompts)
   433â†’
   434â†’	// Extract files from transcript since state.FilesTouched may be empty for mid-session commits
   435â†’	// (no SaveChanges/Stop has been called yet to populate it)
   436â†’	if len(state.FilesTouched) > 0 {
   437â†’		data.FilesTouched = state.FilesTouched
   438â†’	} else {
   439â†’		// Use the shared helper which includes subagent transcripts
   440â†’		data.FilesTouched = s.extractModifiedFilesFromLiveTranscript(state, state.CheckpointTranscriptStart)
   441â†’	}
   442â†’
   443â†’	// Calculate token usage from the extracted transcript portion
   444â†’	if len(data.Transcript) > 0 {
   445â†’		data.TokenUsage = calculateTokenUsage(state.AgentType, data.Transcript, state.CheckpointTranscriptStart)
   446â†’	}
   447â†’
   448â†’	return data, nil
   449â†’}
   450â†’
   451â†’// countTranscriptItems counts lines (JSONL) or messages (JSON) in a transcript.
   452â†’// For Claude Code and JSONL-based agents, this counts lines.
   453â†’// For Gemini CLI and JSON-based agents, this counts messages.
   454â†’// Returns 0 if the content is empty or malformed.
   455â†’func countTranscriptItems(agentType agent.AgentType, content string) int {
   456â†’	if content == "" {
   457â†’		return 0
   458â†’	}
   459â†’
   460â†’	// Try Gemini format first if agentType is Gemini, or as fallback if Unknown
   461â†’	if agentType == agent.AgentTypeGemini || agentType == agent.AgentTypeUnknown {
   462â†’		transcript, err := geminicli.ParseTranscript([]byte(content))
   463â†’		if err == nil && transcript != nil && len(transcript.Messages) > 0 {
   464â†’			return len(transcript.Messages)
   465â†’		}
   466â†’		// If agentType is explicitly Gemini but parsing failed, return 0
   467â†’		if agentType == agent.AgentTypeGemini {
   468â†’			return 0
   469â†’		}
   470â†’		// Otherwise fall through to JSONL parsing for Unknown type
   471â†’	}
   472â†’
   473â†’	// Claude Code and other JSONL-based agents
   474â†’	allLines := strings.Split(content, "\n")
   475â†’	// Trim trailing empty lines (from final \n in JSONL)
   476â†’	for len(allLines) > 0 && strings.TrimSpace(allLines[len(allLines)-1]) == "" {
   477â†’		allLines = allLines[:len(allLines)-1]
   478â†’	}
   479â†’	return len(allLines)
   480â†’}
   481â†’
   482â†’// extractUserPrompts extracts all user prompts from transcript content.
   483â†’// Returns prompts with IDE context tags stripped (e.g., <ide_opened_file>).
   484â†’func extractUserPrompts(agentType agent.AgentType, content string) []string {
   485â†’	if content == "" {
   486â†’		return nil
   487â†’	}
   488â†’
   489â†’	// Try Gemini format first if agentType is Gemini, or as fallback if Unknown
   490â†’	if agentType == agent.AgentTypeGemini || agentType == agent.AgentTypeUnknown {
   491â†’		prompts, err := geminicli.ExtractAllUserPrompts([]byte(content))
   492â†’		if err == nil && len(prompts) > 0 {
   493â†’			// Strip IDE context tags for consistency with Claude Code handling
   494â†’			cleaned := make([]string, 0, len(prompts))
   495â†’			for _, prompt := range prompts {
   496â†’				if stripped := textutil.StripIDEContextTags(prompt); stripped != "" {
   497â†’					cleaned = append(cleaned, stripped)
   498â†’				}
   499â†’			}
   500â†’			return cleaned
   501â†’		}
   502â†’		// If agentType is explicitly Gemini but parsing failed, return nil
   503â†’		if agentType == agent.AgentTypeGemini {
   504â†’			return nil
   505â†’		}
   506â†’		// Otherwise fall through to JSONL parsing for Unknown type
   507â†’	}
   508â†’
   509â†’	// Claude Code and other JSONL-based agents
   510â†’	return extractUserPromptsFromLines(strings.Split(content, "\n"))
   511â†’}
   512â†’
   513â†’// calculateTokenUsage calculates token usage from raw transcript data.
   514â†’// startOffset is the line number (Claude Code) or message index (Gemini CLI)
   515â†’// where the current checkpoint began, allowing calculation for only the portion
   516â†’// of the transcript since the last checkpoint.
   517â†’func calculateTokenUsage(agentType agent.AgentType, data []byte, startOffset int) *agent.TokenUsage {
   518â†’	if len(data) == 0 {
   519â†’		return &agent.TokenUsage{}
   520â†’	}
   521â†’
   522â†’	// Try Gemini format first if agentType is Gemini, or as fallback if Unknown
   523â†’	if agentType == agent.AgentTypeGemini || agentType == agent.AgentTypeUnknown {
   524â†’		// Attempt to parse as Gemini JSON
   525â†’		transcript, err := geminicli.ParseTranscript(data)
   526â†’		if err == nil && transcript != nil && len(transcript.Messages) > 0 {
   527â†’			return geminicli.CalculateTokenUsage(data, startOffset)
   528â†’		}
   529â†’		// If agentType is explicitly Gemini but parsing failed, return empty usage
   530â†’		if agentType == agent.AgentTypeGemini {
   531â†’			return &agent.TokenUsage{}
   532â†’		}
   533â†’		// Otherwise fall through to JSONL parsing for Unknown type
   534â†’	}
   535â†’
   536â†’	// Claude Code and other JSONL-based agents
   537â†’	lines, err := claudecode.ParseTranscript(data)
   538â†’	if err != nil || len(lines) == 0 {
   539â†’		return &agent.TokenUsage{}
   540â†’	}
   541â†’	// Slice transcript lines to only include checkpoint portion
   542â†’	if startOffset > 0 && startOffset < len(lines) {
   543â†’		lines = lines[startOffset:]
   544â†’	}
   545â†’	return claudecode.CalculateTokenUsage(lines)
   546â†’}
   547â†’
   548â†’// extractUserPromptsFromLines extracts user prompts from JSONL transcript lines.
   549â†’// IDE-injected context tags (like <ide_opened_file>) are stripped from the results.
   550â†’func extractUserPromptsFromLines(lines []string) []string {
   551â†’	var prompts []string
   552â†’	for _, line := range lines {
   553â†’		line = strings.TrimSpace(line)
   554â†’		if line == "" {
   555â†’			continue
   556â†’		}
   557â†’
   558â†’		var entry map[string]interface{}
   559â†’		if err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(line), &entry); err != nil {
   560â†’			continue
   561â†’		}
   562â†’
   563â†’		// Check for user message (supports both "human" and "user" types)
   564â†’		msgType, ok := entry["type"].(string)
   565â†’		if !ok || (msgType != "human" && msgType != "user") {
   566â†’			continue
   567â†’		}
   568â†’
   569â†’		// Extract message content
   570â†’		message, ok := entry["message"].(map[string]interface{})
   571â†’		if !ok {
   572â†’			continue
   573â†’		}
   574â†’
   575â†’		// Handle string content
   576â†’		if content, ok := message["content"].(string); ok && content != "" {
   577â†’			cleaned := textutil.StripIDEContextTags(content)
   578â†’			if cleaned != "" {
   579â†’				prompts = append(prompts, cleaned)
   580â†’			}
   581â†’			continue
   582â†’		}
   583â†’
   584â†’		// Handle array content (e.g., multiple text blocks from VSCode)
   585â†’		if arr, ok := message["content"].([]interface{}); ok {
   586â†’			var texts []string
   587â†’			for _, item := range arr {
   588â†’				if m, ok := item.(map[string]interface{}); ok {
   589â†’					if m["type"] == "text" {
   590â†’						if text, ok := m["text"].(string); ok {
   591â†’							texts = append(texts, text)
   592â†’						}
   593â†’					}
   594â†’				}
   595â†’			}
   596â†’			if len(texts) > 0 {
   597â†’				cleaned := textutil.StripIDEContextTags(strings.Join(texts, "\n\n"))
   598â†’				if cleaned != "" {
   599â†’					prompts = append(prompts, cleaned)
   600â†’				}
   601â†’			}
   602â†’		}
   603â†’	}
   604â†’	return prompts
   605â†’}
   606â†’
   607â†’// generateContextFromPrompts generates context.md content from a list of prompts.
   608â†’func generateContextFromPrompts(prompts []string) []byte {
   609â†’	if len(prompts) == 0 {
   610â†’		return nil
   611â†’	}
   612â†’
   613â†’	var buf strings.Builder
   614â†’	buf.WriteString("# Session Context\n\n")
   615â†’	buf.WriteString("## User Prompts\n\n")
   616â†’
   617â†’	for i, prompt := range prompts {
   618â†’		// Truncate very long prompts for readability
   619â†’		displayPrompt := prompt
   620â†’		if len(displayPrompt) > 500 {
   621â†’			displayPrompt = displayPrompt[:500] + "..."
   622â†’		}
   623â†’		buf.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf("### Prompt %d\n\n", i+1))
   624â†’		buf.WriteString(displayPrompt)
   625â†’		buf.WriteString("\n\n")
   626â†’	}
   627â†’
   628â†’	return []byte(buf.String())
   629â†’}
   630â†’
   631â†’// CondenseSessionByID force-condenses a session by its ID and cleans up.
   632â†’// This is used by "entire doctor" to salvage stuck sessions.
   633â†’func (s *ManualCommitStrategy) CondenseSessionByID(sessionID string) error {
   634â†’	ctx := logging.WithComponent(context.Background(), "condense-by-id")
   635â†’
   636â†’	// Load session state
   637â†’	state, err := s.loadSessionState(sessionID)
   638â†’	if err != nil {
   639â†’		return fmt.Errorf("failed to load session state: %w", err)
   640â†’	}
   641â†’	if state == nil {
   642â†’		return fmt.Errorf("session not found: %s", sessionID)
   643â†’	}
   644â†’
   645â†’	// Open repository
   646â†’	repo, err := OpenRepository()
   647â†’	if err != nil {
   648â†’		return fmt.Errorf("failed to open repository: %w", err)
   649â†’	}
   650â†’
   651â†’	// Generate a checkpoint ID
   652â†’	checkpointID, err := id.Generate()
   653â†’	if err != nil {
   654â†’		return fmt.Errorf("failed to generate checkpoint ID: %w", err)
   655â†’	}
   656â†’
   657â†’	// Check if shadow branch exists (required for condensation)
   658â†’	shadowBranchName := getShadowBranchNameForCommit(state.BaseCommit, state.WorktreeID)
   659â†’	refName := plumbing.NewBranchReferenceName(shadowBranchName)
   660â†’	_, refErr := repo.Reference(refName, true)
   661â†’	hasShadowBranch := refErr == nil
   662â†’
   663â†’	if !hasShadowBranch {
   664â†’		// No shadow branch means no checkpoint data to condense.
   665â†’		// Just clean up the state file.
   666â†’		logging.Info(ctx, "no shadow branch for session, clearing state only",
   667â†’			slog.String("session_id", sessionID),
   668â†’			slog.String("shadow_branch", shadowBranchName),
   669â†’		)
   670â†’		if err := s.clearSessionState(sessionID); err != nil {
   671â†’			return fmt.Errorf("failed to clear session state: %w", err)
   672â†’		}
   673â†’		return nil
   674â†’	}
   675â†’
   676â†’	// Condense the session
   677â†’	result, err := s.CondenseSession(repo, checkpointID, state, nil)
   678â†’	if err != nil {
   679â†’		return fmt.Errorf("failed to condense session: %w", err)
   680â†’	}
   681â†’
   682â†’	logging.Info(ctx, "session condensed by ID",
   683â†’		slog.String("session_id", sessionID),
   684â†’		slog.String("checkpoint_id", result.CheckpointID.String()),
   685â†’		slog.Int("checkpoints_condensed", result.CheckpointsCount),
   686â†’	)
   687â†’
   688â†’	// Update session state: reset step count and transition to idle
   689â†’	state.StepCount = 0
   690â†’	state.CheckpointTranscriptStart = result.TotalTranscriptLines
   691â†’	state.Phase = session.PhaseIdle
   692â†’	state.LastCheckpointID = checkpointID
   693â†’	state.AttributionBaseCommit = state.BaseCommit
   694â†’	state.PromptAttributions = nil
   695â†’	state.PendingPromptAttribution = nil
   696â†’
   697â†’	if err := s.saveSessionState(state); err != nil {
   698â†’		return fmt.Errorf("failed to save session state: %w", err)
   699â†’	}
   700â†’
   701â†’	// Clean up shadow branch if no other sessions need it
   702â†’	if err := s.cleanupShadowBranchIfUnused(repo, shadowBranchName, sessionID); err != nil {
   703â†’		logging.Warn(ctx, "failed to clean up shadow branch",
   704â†’			slog.String("shadow_branch", shadowBranchName),
   705â†’			slog.String("error", err.Error()),
   706â†’		)
   707â†’		// Non-fatal: condensation succeeded, shadow branch cleanup is best-effort
   708â†’	}
   709â†’
   710â†’	return nil
   711â†’}
   712â†’
   713â†’// cleanupShadowBranchIfUnused deletes a shadow branch if no other active sessions reference it.
   714â†’func (s *ManualCommitStrategy) cleanupShadowBranchIfUnused(_ *git.Repository, shadowBranchName, excludeSessionID string) error {
   715â†’	// List all session states to check if any other session uses this shadow branch
   716â†’	allStates, err := s.listAllSessionStates()
   717â†’	if err != nil {
   718â†’		return fmt.Errorf("failed to list session states: %w", err)
   719â†’	}
   720â†’
   721â†’	for _, state := range allStates {
   722â†’		if state.SessionID == excludeSessionID {
   723â†’			continue
   724â†’		}
   725â†’		otherShadow := getShadowBranchNameForCommit(state.BaseCommit, state.WorktreeID)
   726â†’		if otherShadow == shadowBranchName && state.StepCount > 0 {
   727â†’			// Another session still needs this shadow branch
   728â†’			return nil
   729â†’		}
   730â†’	}
   731â†’
   732â†’	// No other sessions need it, delete the shadow branch via CLI
   733â†’	// (go-git v5's RemoveReference doesn't persist with packed refs/worktrees)
   734â†’	if err := DeleteBranchCLI(shadowBranchName); err != nil {
   735â†’		// Branch already gone is not an error
   736â†’		if errors.Is(err, ErrBranchNotFound) {
   737â†’			return nil
   738â†’		}
   739â†’		return fmt.Errorf("failed to remove shadow branch: %w", err)
   740â†’	}
   741â†’	return nil
   742â†’}
   743â†’

     - Added `"os"` import

     ```go
     func ParseFromFileAtLine(path string, startLine int) ([]Line, int, error) {
         file, err := os.Open(path) //nolint:gosec // path is a controlled transcript file path
         if err != nil {
             return nil, 0, fmt.Errorf("failed to open transcript: %w", err)
         }
         defer func() { _ = file.Close() }()
         var lines []Line
         reader := bufio.NewReader(file)
         totalLines := 0
         for {
             lineBytes, err := reader.ReadBytes('\n')
             if err != nil && err != io.EOF {
                 return nil, 0, fmt.Errorf("failed to read transcript: %w", err)
             }
             if len(lineBytes) == 0 {
                 if err == io.EOF {
                     break
                 }
                 continue
             }
             if totalLines >= startLine {
                 var line Line
                 if err := json.Unmarshal(lineBytes, &line); err == nil {
                     lines = append(lines, line)
                 }
             }
             totalLines++
             if err == io.EOF {
                 break
             }
         }
         return lines, totalLines, nil
     }
     ```

content.text:
All done. Here's a summary of what was consolidated:

**Deleted 5 duplicate parsers:**
- `cli/transcript.go`: `parseTranscript`, `parseTranscriptFromLine`, `parseTranscriptFromBytes`
- `claudecode/transcript.go`: `ParseTranscript`, `parseTranscriptFromLine` + `scannerBufferSize` constant

**Consolidated into 2 shared functions in `transcript/parse.go`:**
- `ParseFromBytes(content)` (already existed)
- `ParseFromFileAtLine(path, startLine)` (new)

**Updated 8 caller files:**
- `hooks_claudecode_handlers.go` - renamed local `transcript` var to `transcriptLines` to avoid shadowing
- `debug.go`, `rewind.go`, `explain_test.go` - switched to `transcript.ParseFromBytes`/`ParseFromFileAtLine`
- `claudecode/claude.go` - 4 calls switched to `transcript.ParseFromBytes`
- `claudecode/transcript.go` - 3 functions switched to `transcript.ParseFromFileAtLine`
- `manual_commit_condensation.go` - switched to `transcript.ParseFromBytes`
- `claudecode/transcript_test.go` - 7 test calls updated
- `integration_test/agent_test.go` - 1 call updated

**Moved 9 parsing tests** from `cli/transcript_test.go` to `transcript/parse_test.go`.

    27â†’	input     *agent.HookInput

    29â†’}

    31â†’// parseAndLogHookInput parses the hook input and sets up logging context.
    32â†’func parseAndLogHookInput() (*hookInputData, error) {
    33â†’	// Get the agent from the hook command context (e.g., "entire hooks claude-code ...")
    34â†’	ag, err := GetCurrentHookAgent()
    35â†’	if err != nil {
    36â†’		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to get agent: %w", err)
    37â†’	}
    38â†’
    39â†’	// Parse hook input using agent interface
    40â†’	input, err := ag.ParseHookInput(agent.HookUserPromptSubmit, os.Stdin)
    41â†’	if err != nil {
    42â†’		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to parse hook input: %w", err)
    43â†’	}
    44â†’
    45â†’	logCtx := logging.WithAgent(logging.WithComponent(context.Background(), "hooks"), ag.Name())
    46â†’	logging.Info(logCtx, "user-prompt-submit",
    47â†’		slog.String("hook", "user-prompt-submit"),
    48â†’		slog.String("hook_type", "agent"),
    49â†’		slog.String("model_session_id", input.SessionID),
    50â†’		slog.String("transcript_path", input.SessionRef),
    51â†’	)
    52â†’
    53â†’	sessionID := input.SessionID
    54â†’	if sessionID == "" {
    55â†’		sessionID = unknownSessionID
    56â†’	}
    57â†’
    58â†’	// Get the Entire session ID, preferring the persisted value to handle midnight boundary
    59â†’	return &hookInputData{
    60â†’		agent:     ag,
    61â†’		input:     input,
    62â†’		sessionID: sessionID,
    63â†’	}, nil
    64â†’}
    65â†’
    66â†’// captureInitialState captures the initial state on user prompt submit.
    67â†’func captureInitialState() error {
    68â†’	// Parse hook input and setup logging
    69â†’	hookData, err := parseAndLogHookInput()
    70â†’	if err != nil {
    71â†’		return err
    72â†’	}
    73â†’
    74â†’	// CLI captures state directly (including transcript position)
    75â†’	if err := CapturePrePromptState(hookData.sessionID, hookData.input.SessionRef); err != nil {
    76â†’		return err
    77â†’	}
    78â†’
    79â†’	// If strategy implements SessionInitializer, call it to initialize session state
    80â†’	strat := GetStrategy()
    81â†’
    82â†’	// Ensure strategy setup is in place (git hooks, gitignore, metadata branch).
    83â†’	// Done here at turn start so hooks are installed before any mid-turn commits.
    84â†’	if err := strat.EnsureSetup(); err != nil {
    85â†’		fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "Warning: failed to ensure strategy setup: %v\n", err)
    86â†’	}
    87â†’
    88â†’	if initializer, ok := strat.(strategy.SessionInitializer); ok {
    89â†’		agentType := hookData.agent.Type()
    90â†’		if err := initializer.InitializeSession(hookData.sessionID, agentType, hookData.input.SessionRef, hookData.input.UserPrompt); err != nil {
    91â†’			fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "Warning: failed to initialize session state: %v\n", err)
    92â†’		}
    93â†’	}
    94â†’
    95â†’	return nil
    96â†’}

    98â†’// commitWithMetadata commits the session changes with metadata.
    99â†’func commitWithMetadata() error { //nolint:maintidx // already present in codebase
   100â†’	// Get the agent for hook input parsing and session ID transformation
   101â†’	ag, err := GetCurrentHookAgent()
   102â†’	if err != nil {
   103â†’		return fmt.Errorf("failed to get agent: %w", err)
   104â†’	}
   105â†’
   106â†’	// Parse hook input using agent interface
   107â†’	input, err := ag.ParseHookInput(agent.HookStop, os.Stdin)
   108â†’	if err != nil {
   109â†’		return fmt.Errorf("failed to parse hook input: %w", err)
   110â†’	}
   111â†’
   112â†’	logCtx := logging.WithAgent(logging.WithComponent(context.Background(), "hooks"), ag.Name())
   113â†’	logging.Info(logCtx, "stop",
   114â†’		slog.String("hook", "stop"),
   115â†’		slog.String("hook_type", "agent"),
   116â†’		slog.String("model_session_id", input.SessionID),
   117â†’		slog.String("transcript_path", input.SessionRef),
   118â†’	)
   119â†’
   120â†’	sessionID := input.SessionID
   121â†’	if sessionID == "" {
   122â†’		sessionID = unknownSessionID
   123â†’	}
   124â†’
   125â†’	transcriptPath := input.SessionRef
   126â†’	if transcriptPath == "" || !fileExists(transcriptPath) {
   127â†’		return fmt.Errorf("transcript file not found or empty: %s", transcriptPath)
   128â†’	}
   129â†’
   130â†’	// Early check: bail out quickly if the repo has no commits yet.
   131â†’	// Without this, the function does a lot of work (transcript copy, prompt extraction, etc.)
   132â†’	// before eventually failing deep in strategy.SaveChanges().
   133â†’	if repo, err := strategy.OpenRepository(); err == nil && strategy.IsEmptyRepository(repo) {
   134â†’		fmt.Fprintln(os.Stderr, "Entire: skipping checkpoint. Will activate after first commit.")
   135â†’		return NewSilentError(strategy.ErrEmptyRepository)
   136â†’	}
   137â†’
   138â†’	// Create session metadata folder using the entire session ID (preserves original date on resume)
   139â†’	// Use AbsPath to ensure we create at repo root, not relative to cwd
   140â†’	sessionDir := paths.SessionMetadataDirFromSessionID(sessionID)
   141â†’	sessionDirAbs, err := paths.AbsPath(sessionDir)
   142â†’	if err != nil {
   143â†’		sessionDirAbs = sessionDir // Fallback to relative
   144â†’	}
   145â†’	if err := os.MkdirAll(sessionDirAbs, 0o750); err != nil {
   146â†’		return fmt.Errorf("failed to create session directory: %w", err)
   147â†’	}
   148â†’
   149â†’	// Wait for Claude Code to flush the transcript file.
   150â†’	// The stop hook fires before the transcript is fully written to disk.
   151â†’	// We poll for our own hook_progress sentinel entry in the file tail,
   152â†’	// which guarantees all prior entries have been flushed.
   153â†’	waitForTranscriptFlush(transcriptPath, time.Now())
   154â†’
   155â†’	// Copy transcript
   156â†’	logFile := filepath.Join(sessionDirAbs, paths.TranscriptFileName)
   157â†’	if err := copyFile(transcriptPath, logFile); err != nil {
   158â†’		return fmt.Errorf("failed to copy transcript: %w", err)
   159â†’	}
   160â†’	fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "Copied transcript to: %s\n", sessionDir+"/"+paths.TranscriptFileName)
   161â†’
   162â†’	// Load pre-prompt state (captured on UserPromptSubmit)
   163â†’	// Needed for transcript offset and file change detection
   164â†’	preState, err := LoadPrePromptState(sessionID)
   165â†’	if err != nil {
   166â†’		fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "Warning: failed to load pre-prompt state: %v\n", err)
   167â†’	}
   168â†’
   169â†’	// Determine transcript offset: prefer pre-prompt state, fall back to session state.
   170â†’	// Pre-prompt state has the offset when the transcript path was available at prompt time.
   171â†’	// Session state has the offset updated after each successful checkpoint save (auto-commit).
   172â†’	var transcriptOffset int
   173â†’	if preState != nil && preState.StepTranscriptStart > 0 {
   174â†’		transcriptOffset = preState.StepTranscriptStart
   175â†’		fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "Pre-prompt state found: parsing transcript from line %d\n", transcriptOffset)
   176â†’	} else {
   177â†’		// Fall back to session state (e.g., auto-commit strategy updates it after each save)
   178â†’		sessionState, loadErr := strategy.LoadSessionState(sessionID)
   179â†’		if loadErr != nil {
   180â†’			fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "Warning: failed to load session state: %v\n", loadErr)
   181â†’		}
   182â†’		if sessionState != nil && sessionState.CheckpointTranscriptStart > 0 {
   183â†’			transcriptOffset = sessionState.CheckpointTranscriptStart
   184â†’			fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "Session state found: parsing transcript from line %d\n", transcriptOffset)
   185â†’		}

   187â†’
   188â†’	// Parse transcript (optionally from offset for strategies that track transcript position)
   189â†’	// When transcriptOffset > 0, only parse NEW lines since the last checkpoint
   190â†’	var transcriptLines []transcriptLine

   192â†’	if transcriptOffset > 0 {

   194â†’		transcriptLines, totalLines, err = transcript.ParseFromFileAtLine(transcriptPath, transcriptOffset)
   195â†’		if err != nil {
   196â†’			return fmt.Errorf("failed to parse transcript from line %d: %w", transcriptOffset, err)
   197â†’		}

   199â†’	} else {

   201â†’		// Use ParseFromFileAtLine with offset 0 to also get totalLines
   202â†’		transcriptLines, totalLines, err = transcript.ParseFromFileAtLine(transcriptPath, 0)
   203â†’		if err != nil {
   204â†’			return fmt.Errorf("failed to parse transcript: %w", err)
   205â†’		}
   206â†’	}
   207â†’
   208â†’	// Extract all prompts since last checkpoint for prompt file
   209â†’	allPrompts := extractUserPrompts(transcriptLines)
   210â†’	promptFile := filepath.Join(sessionDirAbs, paths.PromptFileName)
   211â†’	promptContent := strings.Join(allPrompts, "\n\n---\n\n")
   212â†’	if err := os.WriteFile(promptFile, []byte(promptContent), 0o600); err != nil {
   213â†’		return fmt.Errorf("failed to write prompt file: %w", err)
   214â†’	}
   215â†’	fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "Extracted %d prompt(s) to: %s\n", len(allPrompts), sessionDir+"/"+paths.PromptFileName)
   216â†’
   217â†’	// Extract summary
   218â†’	summaryFile := filepath.Join(sessionDirAbs, paths.SummaryFileName)
   219â†’	summary := extractLastAssistantMessage(transcriptLines)
   220â†’	if err := os.WriteFile(summaryFile, []byte(summary), 0o600); err != nil {
   221â†’		return fmt.Errorf("failed to write summary file: %w", err)
   222â†’	}
   223â†’	fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "Extracted summary to: %s\n", sessionDir+"/"+paths.SummaryFileName)
   224â†’
   225â†’	// Get modified files from transcript (main agent + subagents).
   226â†’	// Subagent transcripts live in <transcriptDir>/<modelSessionID>/subagents/
   227â†’	subagentsDir := filepath.Join(filepath.Dir(transcriptPath), input.SessionID, "subagents")
   228â†’	modifiedFiles, subagentErr := claudecode.ExtractAllModifiedFiles(transcriptPath, transcriptOffset, subagentsDir)
   229â†’	if subagentErr != nil {
   230â†’		fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "Warning: failed to extract modified files with subagents: %v\n", subagentErr)
   231â†’		// Fall back to main transcript only
   232â†’		modifiedFiles = extractModifiedFiles(transcriptLines)
   233â†’	}
   234â†’
   235â†’	// Generate commit message from last user prompt
   236â†’	lastPrompt := ""
   237â†’	if len(allPrompts) > 0 {
   238â†’		lastPrompt = allPrompts[len(allPrompts)-1]
   239â†’	}
   240â†’	commitMessage := generateCommitMessage(lastPrompt)
   241â†’	fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "Using commit message: %s\n", commitMessage)
   242â†’
   243â†’	// Get repo root for path conversion (not cwd, since Claude may be in a subdirectory)
   244â†’	// Using cwd would filter out files in sibling directories (paths starting with ..)
   245â†’	repoRoot, err := paths.RepoRoot()
   246â†’	if err != nil {
   247â†’		return fmt.Errorf("failed to get repo root: %w", err)
   248â†’	}
   249â†’
   250â†’	if preState != nil {
   251â†’		fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "Pre-prompt state: %d pre-existing untracked files\n", len(preState.UntrackedFiles))
   252â†’	}
   253â†’
   254â†’	// Compute new and deleted files (single git status call)
   255â†’	changes, err := DetectFileChanges(preState.PreUntrackedFiles())
   256â†’	if err != nil {
   257â†’		fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "Warning: failed to compute file changes: %v\n", err)
   258â†’	}
   259â†’
   260â†’	// Filter and normalize all paths (CLI responsibility)
   261â†’	relModifiedFiles := FilterAndNormalizePaths(modifiedFiles, repoRoot)
   262â†’	var relNewFiles, relDeletedFiles []string
   263â†’	if changes != nil {
   264â†’		relNewFiles = FilterAndNormalizePaths(changes.New, repoRoot)
   265â†’		relDeletedFiles = FilterAndNormalizePaths(changes.Deleted, repoRoot)
   266â†’	}
   267â†’
   268â†’	// Check if there are any changes to commit
   269â†’	totalChanges := len(relModifiedFiles) + len(relNewFiles) + len(relDeletedFiles)
   270â†’	if totalChanges == 0 {
   271â†’		fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "No files were modified during this session\n")
   272â†’		fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "Skipping commit\n")
   273â†’		// Still transition phase even when skipping commit â€” the turn is ending.
   274â†’		transitionSessionTurnEnd(sessionID)
   275â†’		// Clean up state even when skipping
   276â†’		if err := CleanupPrePromptState(sessionID); err != nil {

   278â†’		}
   279â†’		return nil
   280â†’	}
   281â†’
   282â†’	fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "Files modified during session (%d):\n", len(relModifiedFiles))
   283â†’	for _, file := range relModifiedFiles {

   285â†’	}
   286â†’	if len(relNewFiles) > 0 {
   287â†’		fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "New files created (%d):\n", len(relNewFiles))
   288â†’		for _, file := range relNewFiles {
   289â†’			fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "  + %s\n", file)
   290â†’		}
   291â†’	}
   292â†’	if len(relDeletedFiles) > 0 {
   293â†’		fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "Files deleted (%d):\n", len(relDeletedFiles))
   294â†’		for _, file := range relDeletedFiles {
   295â†’			fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "  - %s\n", file)
   296â†’		}
   297â†’	}
   298â†’
   299â†’	// Create context file before saving changes
   300â†’	contextFile := filepath.Join(sessionDirAbs, paths.ContextFileName)
   301â†’	if err := createContextFileMinimal(contextFile, commitMessage, sessionID, promptFile, summaryFile, transcriptLines); err != nil {
   302â†’		return fmt.Errorf("failed to create context file: %w", err)

   305â†’
   306â†’	// Get git author from local/global config
   307â†’	author, err := GetGitAuthor()
   308â†’	if err != nil {
   309â†’		return fmt.Errorf("failed to get git author: %w", err)
   310â†’	}
   311â†’
   312â†’	// Get the configured strategy
   313â†’	strat := GetStrategy()
   314â†’
   315â†’	// Get agent type from the currently executing hook agent (authoritative source)
   316â†’	var agentType agent.AgentType
   317â†’	if hookAgent, agentErr := GetCurrentHookAgent(); agentErr == nil {
   318â†’		agentType = hookAgent.Type()
   319â†’	}
   320â†’
   321â†’	// Get transcript position from pre-prompt state (captured at step/turn start)
   322â†’	var transcriptIdentifierAtStart string
   323â†’	var transcriptLinesAtStart int
   324â†’	if preState != nil {
   325â†’		transcriptIdentifierAtStart = preState.LastTranscriptIdentifier
   326â†’		transcriptLinesAtStart = preState.StepTranscriptStart
   327â†’	}
   328â†’
   329â†’	// Calculate token usage for this checkpoint (Claude Code specific)
   330â†’	var tokenUsage *agent.TokenUsage
   331â†’	if transcriptPath != "" {
   332â†’		usage, tokenErr := claudecode.CalculateTotalTokenUsage(transcriptPath, transcriptLinesAtStart, subagentsDir)
   333â†’		if tokenErr != nil {
   334â†’			fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "Warning: failed to calculate token usage: %v\n", tokenErr)
   335â†’		} else {
   336â†’			tokenUsage = usage
   337â†’		}
   338â†’	}
   339â†’
   340â†’	// Build fully-populated save context and delegate to strategy
   341â†’	ctx := strategy.SaveContext{
   342â†’		SessionID:                sessionID,
   343â†’		ModifiedFiles:            relModifiedFiles,
   344â†’		NewFiles:                 relNewFiles,
   345â†’		DeletedFiles:             relDeletedFiles,
   346â†’		MetadataDir:              sessionDir,
   347â†’		MetadataDirAbs:           sessionDirAbs,
   348â†’		CommitMessage:            commitMessage,
   349â†’		TranscriptPath:           transcriptPath,
   350â†’		AuthorName:               author.Name,
   351â†’		AuthorEmail:              author.Email,
   352â†’		AgentType:                agentType,
   353â†’		StepTranscriptIdentifier: transcriptIdentifierAtStart,
   354â†’		StepTranscriptStart:      transcriptLinesAtStart,
   355â†’		TokenUsage:               tokenUsage,
   356â†’	}
   357â†’
   358â†’	if err := strat.SaveChanges(ctx); err != nil {
   359â†’		return fmt.Errorf("failed to save changes: %w", err)
   360â†’	}
   361â†’
   362â†’	// Update session state with new transcript position for strategies that create
   363â†’	// commits on the active branch (auto-commit strategy). This prevents parsing old transcript
   364â†’	// lines on subsequent checkpoints.
   365â†’	// Note: Shadow strategy tracks transcript position per-step via StepTranscriptStart in
   366â†’	// pre-prompt state, but doesn't advance CheckpointTranscriptStart in session state because
   367â†’	// its checkpoints accumulate all files touched across the entire session.
   368â†’	if strat.Name() == strategy.StrategyNameAutoCommit {

   370â†’		sessionState, loadErr := strategy.LoadSessionState(sessionID)
   371â†’		if loadErr != nil {
   372â†’			fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "Warning: failed to load session state: %v\n", loadErr)
   373â†’		}
   374â†’		// Create session state lazily if it doesn't exist (backward compat for resumed sessions
   375â†’		// or if InitializeSession was never called/failed)
   376â†’		if sessionState == nil {
   377â†’			sessionState = &strategy.SessionState{
   378â†’				SessionID: sessionID,
   379â†’			}
   380â†’		}
   381â†’		sessionState.CheckpointTranscriptStart = totalLines
   382â†’		sessionState.StepCount++
   383â†’		if updateErr := strategy.SaveSessionState(sessionState); updateErr != nil {
   384â†’			fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "Warning: failed to update session state: %v\n", updateErr)
   385â†’		} else {
   386â†’			fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "Updated session state: transcript position=%d, checkpoint=%d\n",
   387â†’				totalLines, sessionState.StepCount)
   388â†’		}
   389â†’	}
   390â†’
   391â†’	// Fire EventTurnEnd to transition session phase (all strategies).
   392â†’	// This moves ACTIVE â†’ IDLE.
   393â†’	transitionSessionTurnEnd(sessionID)
   394â†’
   395â†’	// Clean up pre-prompt state (CLI responsibility)
   396â†’	if err := CleanupPrePromptState(sessionID); err != nil {
   397â†’		fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "Warning: failed to cleanup pre-prompt state: %v\n", err)
   398â†’	}
   399â†’
   400â†’	return nil
   401â†’}

   403â†’// handleClaudeCodePostTodo handles the PostToolUse[TodoWrite] hook for subagent checkpoints.
   404â†’// Creates a checkpoint if we're in a subagent context (active pre-task file exists).
   405â†’// Skips silently if not in subagent context (main agent).
   406â†’func handleClaudeCodePostTodo() error {
   407â†’	input, err := parseSubagentCheckpointHookInput(os.Stdin)
   408â†’	if err != nil {
   409â†’		return fmt.Errorf("failed to parse PostToolUse[TodoWrite] input: %w", err)
   410â†’	}
   411â†’
   412â†’	// Get agent for logging context
   413â†’	ag, err := GetCurrentHookAgent()
   414â†’	if err != nil {
   415â†’		return fmt.Errorf("failed to get agent: %w", err)
   416â†’	}
   417â†’
   418â†’	logCtx := logging.WithAgent(logging.WithComponent(context.Background(), "hooks"), ag.Name())
   419â†’	logging.Info(logCtx, "post-todo",
   420â†’		slog.String("hook", "post-todo"),
   421â†’		slog.String("hook_type", "subagent"),
   422â†’		slog.String("model_session_id", input.SessionID),
   423â†’		slog.String("transcript_path", input.TranscriptPath),
   424â†’		slog.String("tool_use_id", input.ToolUseID),
   425â†’	)
   426â†’
   427â†’	// Check if we're in a subagent context by looking for an active pre-task file
   428â†’	taskToolUseID, found := FindActivePreTaskFile()
   429â†’	if !found {
   430â†’		// Not in subagent context - this is a main agent TodoWrite, skip
   431â†’		return nil
   432â†’	}
   433â†’
   434â†’	// Skip on default branch to avoid polluting main/master history
   435â†’	if skip, branchName := ShouldSkipOnDefaultBranch(); skip {
   436â†’		fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "Entire: skipping incremental checkpoint on branch '%s'\n", branchName)
   437â†’		return nil
   438â†’	}
   439â†’
   440â†’	// Detect file changes since last checkpoint
   441â†’	changes, err := DetectFileChanges(nil)
   442â†’	if err != nil {
   443â†’		fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "Warning: failed to detect changed files: %v\n", err)
   444â†’		return nil
   445â†’	}
   446â†’
   447â†’	// If no file changes, skip creating a checkpoint
   448â†’	if len(changes.Modified) == 0 && len(changes.New) == 0 && len(changes.Deleted) == 0 {
   449â†’		fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "[entire] No file changes detected, skipping incremental checkpoint\n")
   450â†’		return nil
   451â†’	}
   452â†’
   453â†’	// Get git author
   454â†’	author, err := GetGitAuthor()
   455â†’	if err != nil {
   456â†’		fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "Warning: failed to get git author: %v\n", err)
   457â†’		return nil
   458â†’	}
   459â†’
   460â†’	// Get the active strategy
   461â†’	strat := GetStrategy()
   462â†’
   463â†’	// Get the session ID from the transcript path or input, then transform to Entire session ID
   464â†’	sessionID := input.SessionID
   465â†’	if sessionID == "" {
   466â†’		sessionID = paths.ExtractSessionIDFromTranscriptPath(input.TranscriptPath)
   467â†’	}
   468â†’
   469â†’	// Get next checkpoint sequence
   470â†’	seq := GetNextCheckpointSequence(sessionID, taskToolUseID)
   471â†’
   472â†’	// Extract the todo content from the tool_input.
   473â†’	// PostToolUse receives the NEW todo list where the just-completed work is
   474â†’	// marked as "completed". The last completed item is the work that was just done.
   475â†’	todoContent := ExtractLastCompletedTodoFromToolInput(input.ToolInput)
   476â†’	if todoContent == "" {
   477â†’		// No completed items - this is likely the first TodoWrite (planning phase).

   515â†’		return nil

   559â†’// handleClaudeCodePostTask handles the PostToolUse[Task] hook
   560â†’func handleClaudeCodePostTask() error {
   561â†’	input, err := parsePostTaskHookInput(os.Stdin)
   562â†’	if err != nil {

   564â†’	}
   565â†’
   566â†’	// Extract subagent type from tool_input for logging
   567â†’	subagentType, taskDescription := ParseSubagentTypeAndDescription(input.ToolInput)

   570â†’	ag, err := GetCurrentHookAgent()

   574â†’

   576â†’	logCtx := logging.WithAgent(logging.WithComponent(context.Background(), "hooks"), ag.Name())

   582â†’		slog.String("subagent_type", subagentType),
   583â†’	)
   584â†’
   585â†’	// Determine subagent transcript path
   586â†’	transcriptDir := filepath.Dir(input.TranscriptPath)
   587â†’	var subagentTranscriptPath string
   588â†’	if input.AgentID != "" {

   594â†’
   595â†’	// Log context to stdout
   596â†’	logPostTaskHookContext(os.Stdout, input, subagentTranscriptPath)
   597â†’
   598â†’	// Parse transcript to extract modified files
   599â†’	var modifiedFiles []string
   600â†’	if subagentTranscriptPath != "" {
   601â†’		// Use subagent transcript if available
   602â†’		parsed, _, parseErr := transcript.ParseFromFileAtLine(subagentTranscriptPath, 0)
   603â†’		if parseErr != nil {
   604â†’			fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "Warning: failed to parse subagent transcript: %v\n", parseErr)
   605â†’		} else {

   607â†’		}
   608â†’	} else {

   610â†’		parsed, _, parseErr := transcript.ParseFromFileAtLine(input.TranscriptPath, 0)
   611â†’		if parseErr != nil {

   613â†’		} else {

   615â†’		}

   617â†’
   618â†’	// Load pre-task state and compute new files
   619â†’	preState, err := LoadPreTaskState(input.ToolUseID)

   622â†’	}
   623â†’
   624â†’	// Compute new and deleted files (single git status call)
   625â†’	changes, err := DetectFileChanges(preState.PreUntrackedFiles())

   628â†’	}
   629â†’
   630â†’	// Get repo root for path conversion (not cwd, since Claude may be in a subdirectory)
   631â†’	// Using cwd would filter out files in sibling directories (paths starting with ..)
   632â†’	repoRoot, err := paths.RepoRoot()

   635â†’	}
   636â†’
   637â†’	// Filter and normalize paths
   638â†’	relModifiedFiles := FilterAndNormalizePaths(modifiedFiles, repoRoot)
   639â†’	var relNewFiles, relDeletedFiles []string
   640â†’	if changes != nil {

   642â†’		relDeletedFiles = FilterAndNormalizePaths(changes.Deleted, repoRoot)

   653â†’	// Find checkpoint UUID from main transcript (best-effort, ignore errors)
   654â†’	mainLines, _, _ := transcript.ParseFromFileAtLine(input.TranscriptPath, 0) //nolint:errcheck // best-effort extraction

   662â†’
   663â†’	// Get the configured strategy
   664â†’	strat := GetStrategy()
   665â†’
   666â†’	// Get agent type from the currently executing hook agent (authoritative source)
   667â†’	var agentType agent.AgentType

   669â†’		agentType = hookAgent.Type()

   672â†’	// Build task checkpoint context - strategy handles metadata creation

   675â†’	ctx := strategy.TaskCheckpointContext{

   692â†’	// Call strategy to save task checkpoint - strategy handles all metadata creation
   693â†’	if err := strat.SaveTaskCheckpoint(ctx); err != nil {

   703â†’// handleClaudeCodeSessionStart handles the SessionStart hook for Claude Code.

   708â†’// handleClaudeCodeSessionEnd handles the SessionEnd hook for Claude Code.
   709â†’// This fires when the user explicitly closes the session.
   710â†’// Updates the session state with EndedAt timestamp.
   711â†’func handleClaudeCodeSessionEnd() error {
   712â†’	ag, err := GetCurrentHookAgent()
   713â†’	if err != nil {
   714â†’		return fmt.Errorf("failed to get agent: %w", err)
   715â†’	}
   716â†’
   717â†’	input, err := ag.ParseHookInput(agent.HookSessionEnd, os.Stdin)
   718â†’	if err != nil {
   719â†’		return fmt.Errorf("failed to parse hook input: %w", err)
   720â†’	}
   721â†’
   722â†’	logCtx := logging.WithAgent(logging.WithComponent(context.Background(), "hooks"), ag.Name())
   723â†’	logging.Info(logCtx, "session-end",
   724â†’		slog.String("hook", "session-end"),
   725â†’		slog.String("hook_type", "agent"),
   726â†’		slog.String("model_session_id", input.SessionID),
   727â†’	)
   728â†’
   729â†’	if input.SessionID == "" {
   730â†’		return nil // No session to update
   731â†’	}
   732â†’
   733â†’	// Best-effort cleanup - don't block session closure on failure
   734â†’	if err := markSessionEnded(input.SessionID); err != nil {
   735â†’		fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "Warning: failed to mark session ended: %v\n", err)
   736â†’	}
   737â†’	return nil
   738â†’}
   739â†’
   740â†’// transitionSessionTurnEnd fires EventTurnEnd to move the session from
   741â†’// ACTIVE â†’ IDLE. Best-effort: logs warnings on failure rather than
   742â†’// returning errors.
   743â†’func transitionSessionTurnEnd(sessionID string) {
   744â†’	turnState, loadErr := strategy.LoadSessionState(sessionID)
   745â†’	if loadErr != nil {
   746â†’		fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "Warning: failed to load session state for turn end: %v\n", loadErr)
   747â†’		return
   748â†’	}
   749â†’	if turnState == nil {
   750â†’		return
   751â†’	}
   752â†’	strategy.TransitionAndLog(turnState, session.EventTurnEnd, session.TransitionContext{})
   753â†’
   754â†’	// Always dispatch to strategy for turn-end handling. The strategy reads
   755â†’	// work items from state (e.g. TurnCheckpointIDs), not the action list.
   756â†’	strat := GetStrategy()
   757â†’	if handler, ok := strat.(strategy.TurnEndHandler); ok {
   758â†’		if err := handler.HandleTurnEnd(turnState); err != nil {
   759â†’			fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "Warning: turn-end action dispatch failed: %v\n", err)
   760â†’		}
   761â†’	}
   762â†’
   763â†’	if updateErr := strategy.SaveSessionState(turnState); updateErr != nil {
   764â†’		fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "Warning: failed to update session phase on turn end: %v\n", updateErr)
   765â†’	}
   766â†’}

   768â†’// markSessionEnded transitions the session to ENDED phase via the state machine.
   769â†’func markSessionEnded(sessionID string) error {
   770â†’	state, err := strategy.LoadSessionState(sessionID)
   771â†’	if err != nil {
   772â†’		return fmt.Errorf("failed to load session state: %w", err)
   773â†’	}
   774â†’	if state == nil {
   775â†’		return nil // No state file, nothing to update
   776â†’	}
   777â†’
   778â†’	strategy.TransitionAndLog(state, session.EventSessionStop, session.TransitionContext{})
   779â†’
   780â†’	now := time.Now()
   781â†’	state.EndedAt = &now
   782â†’
   783â†’	if err := strategy.SaveSessionState(state); err != nil {
   784â†’		return fmt.Errorf("failed to save session state: %w", err)
   785â†’	}
   786â†’	return nil
   787â†’}

   789â†’// stopHookSentinel is the string that appears in Claude Code's hook_progress
   790â†’// transcript entry when it launches our stop hook. Used to detect that the
   791â†’// transcript file has been fully flushed before we copy it.
   792â†’const stopHookSentinel = "hooks claude-code stop"
   793â†’
   794â†’// waitForTranscriptFlush polls the transcript file tail for the hook_progress
   795â†’// sentinel entry that Claude Code writes when launching the stop hook.
   796â†’// Once this entry appears in the file, all prior entries (assistant replies,
   797â†’// tool results) are guaranteed to have been flushed.
   798â†’//
   799â†’// hookStartTime is the approximate time our process started, used to avoid
   800â†’// matching stale sentinel entries from previous stop hook invocations.
   801â†’//
   802â†’// Falls back silently after a timeout â€” the transcript copy will proceed
   803â†’// with whatever data is available.
   804â†’func waitForTranscriptFlush(transcriptPath string, hookStartTime time.Time) {
   805â†’	const (
   806â†’		maxWait      = 3 * time.Second
   807â†’		pollInterval = 50 * time.Millisecond
   808â†’		tailBytes    = 4096 // Read last 4KB â€” sentinel is near the end
   809â†’		maxSkew      = 2 * time.Second
   810â†’	)
   811â†’
   812â†’	logCtx := logging.WithComponent(context.Background(), "hooks")
   813â†’	deadline := time.Now().Add(maxWait)
   814â†’	for time.Now().Before(deadline) {
   815â†’		if checkStopSentinel(transcriptPath, tailBytes, hookStartTime, maxSkew) {
   816â†’			logging.Debug(logCtx, "transcript flush sentinel found",
   817â†’				slog.Duration("wait", time.Since(hookStartTime)),
   818â†’			)
   819â†’			return
   820â†’		}
   821â†’		time.Sleep(pollInterval)
   822â†’	}
   823â†’	// Timeout â€” proceed with whatever is on disk.
   824â†’	logging.Warn(logCtx, "transcript flush sentinel not found within timeout, proceeding",
   825â†’		slog.Duration("timeout", maxWait),
   826â†’	)
   827â†’}
   828â†’
   829â†’// checkStopSentinel reads the tail of the transcript file and looks for a
   830â†’// hook_progress entry containing the stop hook sentinel, with a timestamp
   831â†’// close to hookStartTime.
   832â†’func checkStopSentinel(path string, tailBytes int64, hookStartTime time.Time, maxSkew time.Duration) bool {
   833â†’	f, err := os.Open(path) //nolint:gosec // path comes from agent hook input
   834â†’	if err != nil {
   835â†’		return false
   836â†’	}
   837â†’	defer f.Close()
   838â†’
   839â†’	// Seek to tail
   840â†’	info, err := f.Stat()
   841â†’	if err != nil {
   842â†’		return false
   843â†’	}
   844â†’	offset := info.Size() - tailBytes
   845â†’	if offset < 0 {
   846â†’		offset = 0
   847â†’	}
   848â†’	buf := make([]byte, info.Size()-offset)
   849â†’	if _, err := f.ReadAt(buf, offset); err != nil {
   850â†’		return false
   851â†’	}
   852â†’
   853â†’	// Scan lines from the tail for the sentinel
   854â†’	lines := strings.Split(string(buf), "\n")
   855â†’	for _, line := range lines {
   856â†’		line = strings.TrimSpace(line)
   857â†’		if line == "" || !strings.Contains(line, stopHookSentinel) {
   858â†’			continue
   859â†’		}
   860â†’
   861â†’		// Parse timestamp to check recency
   862â†’		var entry struct {
   863â†’			Timestamp string `json:"timestamp"`
   864â†’		}
   865â†’		if json.Unmarshal([]byte(line), &entry) != nil || entry.Timestamp == "" {
   866â†’			continue
   867â†’		}
   868â†’		ts, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339Nano, entry.Timestamp)
   869â†’		if err != nil {
   870â†’			ts, err = time.Parse(time.RFC3339, entry.Timestamp)
   871â†’			if err != nil {
   872â†’				continue
   873â†’			}
   874â†’		}
   875â†’
   876â†’		// Check timestamp is within skew window of our start time
   877â†’		if ts.After(hookStartTime.Add(-maxSkew)) && ts.Before(hookStartTime.Add(maxSkew)) {
   878â†’			return true
   879â†’		}
   880â†’	}
   881â†’	return false
   882â†’}

   332â†’func runRewindList() error {

   345â†’		Date             string `json:"date"`
   346â†’		IsTaskCheckpoint bool   `json:"is_task_checkpoint"`

   472â†’	if selectedPoint.IsTaskCheckpoint {
   473â†’		checkpoint, err := start.GetTaskCheckpoint(*selectedPoint)
   474â†’		if err != nil {
   475â†’			fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "Warning: failed to read task checkpoint: %v\n", err)
   476â†’			return nil
   477â†’		}
   478â†’
   479â†’		sessionID = checkpoint.SessionID
   480â†’
   481â†’		if checkpoint.CheckpointUUID != "" {
   482â†’			// Use strategy-based transcript restoration for task checkpoints
   483â†’			if err := restoreTaskCheckpointTranscript(start, *selectedPoint, sessionID, checkpoint.CheckpointUUID, agent); err != nil {
   484â†’				fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "Warning: failed to restore truncated session transcript: %v\n", err)
   485â†’			} else {
   486â†’				fmt.Printf("Rewound to task checkpoint. %s\n", agent.FormatResumeCommand(sessionID))
   487â†’			}
   488â†’			return nil
   489â†’		}
   490â†’	} else {
   491â†’		// Prefer SessionID from trailer over path-based extraction
   492â†’		sessionID = selectedPoint.SessionID
   493â†’		if sessionID == "" {
   494â†’			sessionID = filepath.Base(selectedPoint.MetadataDir)
   495â†’		}
   496â†’		transcriptFile = filepath.Join(selectedPoint.MetadataDir, paths.TranscriptFileNameLegacy)
   497â†’	}
   498â†’
   499â†’	// Try to restore transcript using the appropriate method:
   500â†’	// 1. Checkpoint storage (committed checkpoints with valid checkpoint ID)
   501â†’	// 2. Shadow branch (uncommitted checkpoints with commit hash)
   502â†’	// 3. Local file (active sessions)
   503â†’	var restored bool
   504â†’	if !selectedPoint.CheckpointID.IsEmpty() {
   505â†’		// Try checkpoint storage first for committed checkpoints
   506â†’		if returnedSessionID, err := restoreSessionTranscriptFromStrategy(selectedPoint.CheckpointID, sessionID, agent); err == nil {
   507â†’			sessionID = returnedSessionID
   508â†’			restored = true
   509â†’		}
   510â†’	}
   511â†’
   512â†’	if !restored && selectedPoint.MetadataDir != "" && len(selectedPoint.ID) == 40 {
   513â†’		// Try shadow branch for uncommitted checkpoints (ID is a 40-char commit hash)
   514â†’		if returnedSessionID, err := restoreSessionTranscriptFromShadow(selectedPoint.ID, selectedPoint.MetadataDir, sessionID, agent); err == nil {
   515â†’			sessionID = returnedSessionID
   516â†’			restored = true
   517â†’		}
   518â†’	}
   519â†’
   520â†’	if !restored {
   521â†’		// Fall back to local file
   522â†’		if err := restoreSessionTranscript(transcriptFile, sessionID, agent); err != nil {
   523â†’			fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "Warning: failed to restore session transcript: %v\n", err)
   524â†’		}
   525â†’	}
   526â†’
   527â†’	fmt.Printf("Rewound to %s. %s\n", selectedPoint.ID[:7], agent.FormatResumeCommand(sessionID))
   528â†’	return nil
   529â†’}

   574â†’// handleLogsOnlyResetNonInteractive handles reset in non-interactive mode.
   575â†’// This performs a git reset --hard to the target commit.
   576â†’func handleLogsOnlyResetNonInteractive(start strategy.Strategy, point strategy.RewindPoint) error {
   577â†’	// Resolve agent once for use throughout
   578â†’	agent, err := getAgent(point.Agent)
   579â†’	if err != nil {
   580â†’		return fmt.Errorf("failed to get agent: %w", err)
   581â†’	}
   582â†’
   583â†’	// Initialize logging context with agent from checkpoint
   584â†’	ctx := logging.WithComponent(context.Background(), "rewind")
   585â†’	ctx = logging.WithAgent(ctx, agent.Name())
   586â†’
   587â†’	logging.Debug(ctx, "logs-only reset started",
   588â†’		slog.String("checkpoint_id", point.ID),
   589â†’		slog.String("session_id", point.SessionID),
   590â†’	)
   591â†’
   592â†’	restorer, ok := start.(strategy.LogsOnlyRestorer)
   593â†’	if !ok {
   594â†’		return errors.New("strategy does not support logs-only restoration")
   595â†’	}
   596â†’
   597â†’	// Get current HEAD before reset (for recovery message)
   598â†’	currentHead, headErr := getCurrentHeadHash()
   599â†’	if headErr != nil {
   600â†’		currentHead = ""
   601â†’	}
   602â†’
   603â†’	// Restore logs first
   604â†’	sessions, err := restorer.RestoreLogsOnly(point, true) // force=true for explicit rewind
   605â†’	if err != nil {
   606â†’		logging.Error(ctx, "logs-only reset failed during log restoration",
   607â†’			slog.String("checkpoint_id", point.ID),
   608â†’			slog.String("error", err.Error()),
   609â†’		)
   610â†’		return fmt.Errorf("failed to restore logs: %w", err)
   611â†’	}
   612â†’
   613â†’	// Perform git reset --hard
   614â†’	if err := performGitResetHard(point.ID); err != nil {
   615â†’		logging.Error(ctx, "logs-only reset failed during git reset",
   616â†’			slog.String("checkpoint_id", point.ID),
   617â†’			slog.String("error", err.Error()),
   618â†’		)
   619â†’		return fmt.Errorf("failed to reset branch: %w", err)
   620â†’	}
   621â†’
   622â†’	logging.Debug(ctx, "logs-only reset completed",
   623â†’		slog.String("checkpoint_id", point.ID),
   624â†’	)
   625â†’
   626â†’	shortID := point.ID
   627â†’	if len(shortID) > 7 {
   628â†’		shortID = shortID[:7]
   629â†’	}
   630â†’
   631â†’	fmt.Printf("Reset branch to %s.\n", shortID)
   632â†’
   633â†’	// Show resume commands for all sessions
   634â†’	printMultiSessionResumeCommands(sessions)
   635â†’
   636â†’	// Show recovery instructions
   637â†’	if currentHead != "" && currentHead != point.ID {
   638â†’		currentShort := currentHead
   639â†’		if len(currentShort) > 7 {
   640â†’			currentShort = currentShort[:7]
   641â†’		}
   642â†’		fmt.Printf("\nTo undo this reset: git reset --hard %s\n", currentShort)
   643â†’	}
   644â†’
   645â†’	return nil
   646â†’}

   667â†’// restoreSessionTranscriptFromStrategy restores a session transcript from checkpoint storage.
   668â†’// This is used for strategies that store transcripts in git branches rather than local files.
   669â†’// Returns the session ID that was actually used (may differ from input if checkpoint provides one).
   670â†’func restoreSessionTranscriptFromStrategy(cpID id.CheckpointID, sessionID string, agent agentpkg.Agent) (string, error) {
   671â†’	// Get transcript content from checkpoint storage
   672â†’	content, returnedSessionID, err := checkpoint.LookupSessionLog(cpID)
   673â†’	if err != nil {
   674â†’		return "", fmt.Errorf("failed to get session log: %w", err)
   675â†’	}
   676â†’
   677â†’	// Use session ID returned from checkpoint if available
   678â†’	// Otherwise fall back to the passed-in sessionID
   679â†’	if returnedSessionID != "" {
   680â†’		sessionID = returnedSessionID
   681â†’	}
   682â†’
   683â†’	return writeTranscriptToAgentSession(content, sessionID, agent)

   686â†’// restoreSessionTranscriptFromShadow restores a session transcript from a shadow branch commit.
   687â†’// This is used for uncommitted checkpoints where the transcript is stored in the shadow branch tree.
   688â†’func restoreSessionTranscriptFromShadow(commitHash, metadataDir, sessionID string, agent agentpkg.Agent) (string, error) {
   689â†’	// Open repository
   690â†’	repo, err := git.PlainOpenWithOptions(".", &git.PlainOpenOptions{DetectDotGit: true})
   691â†’	if err != nil {
   692â†’		return "", fmt.Errorf("failed to open repository: %w", err)
   693â†’	}
   694â†’
   695â†’	// Parse commit hash
   696â†’	hash := plumbing.NewHash(commitHash)
   697â†’	if hash.IsZero() {
   698â†’		return "", fmt.Errorf("invalid commit hash: %s", commitHash)
   699â†’	}
   700â†’
   701â†’	// Get transcript from shadow branch commit tree
   702â†’	store := checkpoint.NewGitStore(repo)
   703â†’	content, err := store.GetTranscriptFromCommit(hash, metadataDir, agent.Type())
   704â†’	if err != nil {
   705â†’		return "", fmt.Errorf("failed to get transcript from shadow branch: %w", err)
   706â†’	}
   707â†’
   708â†’	return writeTranscriptToAgentSession(content, sessionID, agent)
   709â†’}

   747â†’// restoreTaskCheckpointTranscript restores a truncated transcript for a task checkpoint.
   748â†’// Uses GetTaskCheckpointTranscript to fetch the transcript from the strategy.
   749â†’//
   750â†’// NOTE: The transcript parsing/truncation/writing pipeline (transcript.ParseFromBytes,
   751â†’// TruncateTranscriptAtUUID, writeTranscript) assumes Claude's JSONL format.
   752â†’// This is acceptable because task checkpoints are currently only created by Claude Code's
   753â†’// PostToolUse hook. If other agents gain sub-agent support, this will need a
   754â†’// format-aware refactor (agent-specific parsing, truncation, and serialization).
   755â†’func restoreTaskCheckpointTranscript(strat strategy.Strategy, point strategy.RewindPoint, sessionID, checkpointUUID string, agent agentpkg.Agent) error {
   756â†’	// Get transcript content from strategy
   757â†’	content, err := strat.GetTaskCheckpointTranscript(point)
   758â†’	if err != nil {
   759â†’		return fmt.Errorf("failed to get task checkpoint transcript: %w", err)
   760â†’	}
   761â†’
   762â†’	// Parse the transcript
   763â†’	parsed, err := transcript.ParseFromBytes(content)
   764â†’	if err != nil {
   765â†’		return fmt.Errorf("failed to parse transcript: %w", err)
   766â†’	}
   767â†’
   768â†’	// Truncate at checkpoint UUID
   769â†’	truncated := TruncateTranscriptAtUUID(parsed, checkpointUUID)
   770â†’
   771â†’	sessionFile, err := resolveTranscriptPath(sessionID, agent)
   772â†’	if err != nil {
   773â†’		return err
   774â†’	}
   775â†’
   776â†’	// Ensure parent directory exists
   777â†’	if err := os.MkdirAll(filepath.Dir(sessionFile), 0o750); err != nil {
   778â†’		return fmt.Errorf("failed to create agent session directory: %w", err)
   779â†’	}
   780â†’
   781â†’	fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "Writing truncated transcript to: %s\n", sessionFile)
   782â†’
   783â†’	if err := writeTranscript(sessionFile, truncated); err != nil {
   784â†’		return fmt.Errorf("failed to write truncated transcript: %w", err)
   785â†’	}
   786â†’
   787â†’	return nil
   788â†’}

   816â†’// handleLogsOnlyRewindInteractive handles rewind for logs-only points with a sub-choice menu.
